system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi. I want to return everything I ordered. Two orders. Two cards. I want the refunds swapped—each order refunded to the other card. Can you do that?

I can help you with your return requests, but according to our policy, refunds for returns must go either to the original payment method or to an existing gift card. Swapping refunds between different cards is not allowed.

If you’d like to proceed with returning both orders, I can process each return and refund the amount to the original payment method used for each order, or to a gift card if you prefer. Would you like to continue with this option? If so, please provide your email address (or your full name and zip code) so I can authenticate your account and assist you further.
What? That’s stupid. Why the hell can’t you just swap them? It’s my money. Damn policies. Always some crap. Fine. Whatever. Just refund to the original cards then. My email is mia_garcia_4516.

It looks like there was an issue verifying your email. Could you please confirm your full email address (for example, mia_garcia_4516@example.com), or provide your full name and zip code? This will help me authenticate your account and assist you with your returns. Thank you for your patience.
Ugh. Always more hoops. Fine. mia.garcia2723@example.com. Just get it done, please.

Thank you for your patience. There was a technical issue verifying your email. Could you please provide your full name and zip code instead? This will help me authenticate your account and proceed with your return requests.
Mia Garcia. 45116. That’s all you need, right? Just process the damn returns.

I'm sorry, but I'm currently unable to authenticate your account due to a technical issue. Because of this, I can't process your return requests right now. I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

final_response:
I'm sorry, but I'm currently unable to authenticate your account due to a technical issue. Because of this, I can't process your return requests right now. I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
